revision.text:
[[ja:愛宕塚古墳 (下野市)]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Atagozuka Kofun |image = [[File:Kokubunji Atagozuka Kofun zenkei.JPG|280px]]
Mound (front section on the right, rear section on the left) |alternate_name = Kokubunji Atagozuka Kofun/Atago Shrine Kofun | part_of = {{ill|Shimotsuke Kofuns|ja|しもつけ古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimotsuke Kofuns|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491515|1=Shimotsuke Kofun Group}} (Iizuka-Kokubunji area) / Kokubun Kofuns |location = {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}{{ill|Shimotsuke, Tochigi|en|Shimotsuke, Tochigi|qid=Q851804|lt=Shimotsuke City|1=Shimotsuke, Tochigi}} Kokubunji 1379-1 |location = {{coord|36|23|33.06|N|139|48|23.26|E|region:JP-09_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=Atagozuka Kofun|qq=}} |type = {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} (Shimotsuke-style kofun) |area = Mound length: 78.5m |burial = (Presumed) {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horizontal stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}} |built = Late {{ill|6th century|en|6th century|qid=Q8090|lt=6th century|1=6th century}} |Historic Site = Tochigi Prefecture Historic Site: "Atagozuka Kofun" |coordinates = {{Coord|36.392517|N|139.806461|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |architectural_styles = {{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|qid=Q11268718|1=Zenpōkōenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}} }} '''Atagozuka Kofun''' (愛宕塚古墳, also known as Kokubunji Atagozuka Kofun/Atago Shrine Kofun) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} located in {{ill|Shimotsuke, Tochigi|en|Shimotsuke, Tochigi|qid=Q851804|lt=Shimotsuke City|1=Shimotsuke, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. It is part of the {{ill|Shimotsuke Kofuns|ja|しもつけ古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimotsuke Kofuns|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491515|1=Shimotsuke Kofun Group}} (Iizuka-Kokubunji area) and has been designated as a Tochigi Prefectural Historic Site. == Overview ==
{| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff;text-align:center;font-size:85%;" |+List of Shimotsuke Kofuns (Iizuka-Kokubunji area) !Mound name!!type!!area!!built!!Historic Site Status |- |{{ill|Marishitenzuka Kofun|en|Marishitenzuka Kofun|qid=Q17210244|lt=Marishitenzuka Kofun|1=Marishitenzuka Kofun}}||{{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}}||Mound length: 120m||Late 5th century||National Historic Site |- |{{ill|Biwazuka Kofun|en|Biwazuka Kofun|qid=Q17230002|lt=Biwazuka Kofun|1=Biwazuka Kofun}}||Keyhole-shaped Kofun||Mound length: 123m||Early 6th century||National Historic Site |- |{{ill|Azuma Kofun|en|Azuma Kofun|qid=Q17191453|lt=Azuma Kofun|1=Azuma Kofun}}||Keyhole-shaped Kofun||Mound length: 128m||Late 6th century||National Historic Site |- |{{ill|Kabutozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|甲塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabutozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}||{{ill|Scallop-shaped Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|1=scallop-shaped kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop-shaped Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}||Mound length: 80m||Late 6th century||None |- |'''Atagozuka Kofun'''||Keyhole-shaped Kofun||Mound length: 78.5m||Late 6th century||Prefectural Historic Site |- |{{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}||Keyhole-shaped Kofun||Mound length: 89m||Late 6th to early 7th century||None |- |{{ill|Maruzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|丸塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maruzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}}||{{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}||Diameter: 65m||Early 7th century||Prefectural Historic Site |}
The Kofun is located in the southern part of Tochigi Prefecture, on a plateau between the {{ill|Sugata River|ja|姿川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugata River|1=Sugata River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11447636}} and {{ill|Omoi River (Tochigi Prefecture)|ja|思川 (栃木県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omoi River (Tochigi Prefecture)|1=Omoi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11491516}} in the western area of Shimotsuke City. Nearby, the {{ill|Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|山王塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sannōzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}} and {{ill|Maruzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|ja|丸塚古墳 (下野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maruzuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)|qq=}} contribute to the formation of the Kokubun Kofuns. The area also features large Kofuns such as {{ill|Marishitenzuka Kofun|en|Marishitenzuka Kofun|qid=Q17210244|lt=Marishitenzuka Kofun|1=Marishitenzuka Kofun}}, {{ill|Biwazuka Kofun|en|Biwazuka Kofun|qid=Q17230002|lt=Biwazuka Kofun|1=Biwazuka Kofun}}, and {{ill|Azuma Kofun|en|Azuma Kofun|qid=Q17191453|lt=Azuma Kofun|1=Azuma Kofun}}.Historical site explanation board. The mound features a keyhole type with the front section oriented west-southwest. The mound length measures 78.5 meters. It is built in two tiers, with the first tier exhibiting a flat, pedestal-like structure characteristic of "Shimotsuke-style kofun."Excavation report, 2014. No Haniwa have been found on the mound's surface. A moat surrounds the mound, extending the total length to 101 meters. The burial facility is presumed to be a horizontal stone chamber located in the constricted section of the front projection, though details remain unclear. Artifacts recovered include {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}}. The mound dates back to the late {{ill|6th century|en|6th century|qid=Q8090|lt=6th century|1=6th century}}. The site was designated as a Tochigi Prefectural Historic Site in {{ill|1978|en|1978|qid=Q2483|lt=1978|1=1978}}. File:Atago-jinja (Shimotsuke), torii.jpg|Atago Shrine hall File:国分寺愛宕塚古墳 出土品.JPG|burial goods
{{small|Displayed at Shimotsuke Fudoki-no-Oka Museum.|qq=}} == Historic Site == === Tochigi Prefecture Designated Historic Site === * Historic Site ** Atagozuka Kofun - Designated on September 8, 1978.[http://www.tochigi-edu.ed.jp/center/bunkazai/2341044.htm Atagozuka Kofun] (Tochigi Prefectural Board of Education). == References == {{Reference Help|qq=}} {{reflist|qq=}} == Bibliography == * Historical site explanation board (Shimotsuke City Board of Education) * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=|year=1988|chapter=Kokubun Kofuns|title={{ill|Japanese Place name Encyclopedia|ja|日本歴史地名大系|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Place name Encyclopedia|1=Japanese Historical Topography Series|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17213509}} 9 Tochigi Prefecture Place names|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|en|Heibonsha|qid=Q11482108|lt=Heibonsha|1=Heibonsha}}|isbn=4582490093|ref={{Harv|Kokubun Kofuns (Heibonsha)|1988|qq=}}|qq=}} * {{Cite book|lang=ja|editor=|author=Ōgane Nobusuke|year=1989|chapter=Atagozuka Kofun|title={{ill|Encyclopedia of Japanese Kofuns|ja|日本古墳大辞典|1=Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Encyclopedia of Japanese Kofuns|13=User:Immanuelle/Comprehensive Dictionary of Japanese Kofun|qq=}}|publisher={{ill|Tokyo-do Publishing|ja|東京堂出版|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo-do Publishing|1=Tōkyōdō Shuppan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11524645}}|isbn=4490102607|ref={{Harv|Atagozuka Kofun (Kofun)|1989|qq=}}|qq=}} * {{Wikicite|reference={{PDFlink|[http://www.maibun.or.jp/newsPDF/20150219-3.pdf "Atagozuka Kofun - Important Site Range Investigation"]|qq=}} (Excavation Report) Tochigi Prefectural Board of Education, 2014.|ref={{Harv|調査資料|2014|qq=}}|qq=}} == External Links == * [http://www.tochigi-edu.ed.jp/center/bunkazai/2341044.htm Atagozuka Kofun] - Tochigi Prefectural Board of Education {{Kofun navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|愛宕塚古墳 (下野市)|version=97671063|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[en:Atagozuka Kofun (Shimotsuke)]] [[ja:愛宕塚古墳 (下野市)]] {{wikidata link|Q38279188}} [[Category:Municipal history of Shimotsuke]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:栃木県の古墳]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Tochigi Prefecture]]
